# fucina

> A Gemma 4 12B inference engine in Go + CUDA C++, built for exactly one target: the NVIDIA DGX
> Spark **GB10** (Blackwell, `sm_121a`, CUDA 13.0). Loads Q4_0 (QAT) / Q8_0 GGUF weights, runs the
> full forward pass on-GPU with FP8 Tensor-Core attention, and serves an OpenAI-compatible HTTP API
> plus one-shot and interactive CLI modes. It also runs the experimental DiffusionGemma 26B-A4B
> MoE model via `-dm`. Apache-2.0, **experimental, hardware-specific, no support**.
> *fucina* is Italian for **forge**. Repo: `github.com/hikmaai-io/fucina` (formerly `gem4d`).

This file orients an LLM/coding agent so it can answer questions about the repo AND actually run
inference. Module path: `github.com/hikmaai-io/fucina`. Binary: `fucina`.

## Hard constraints (read before doing anything)

- **Hardware:** runs ONLY on the DGX Spark GB10 (`sm_121` / built as `sm_121a`). It will NOT build
  or run on other GPUs (RTX 30xx/40xx/50xx, A100, H100, B100/B200) — the Makefile pins `CUDA_ARCH`
  and the hot paths use GB10 FP8/NVFP4 tensor-core features. Do not attempt ports casually.
- **Toolchain:** CUDA 13.0 at `/usr/local/cuda-13`, Go 1.26 at `/usr/local/go` (override via
  `NVCC`/`CUDA_HOME`/`GO` make vars). `build-essential` (gcc/g++, make, ar).
- **Quant:** only **Q4_0 (QAT)** or **Q8_0** GGUF for the dense 12B; other formats are rejected.
- **Never commit/push model weights** — `*.gguf`, `*.safetensors`, `/models/` are git-ignored.

## Run inference (copy-paste)

```sh
# 1. install deps (DGX OS / Ubuntu)
sudo apt-get install -y build-essential
pip install -U "huggingface_hub[cli]"

# 2. build the dense engine (add CUTLASS_DIR=... only if you also want DiffusionGemma)
make                       # -> ./fucina  (asserts cubin sm_121a + device-upload path)

# 3. download a model (Q4_0 QAT recommended; optional MTP draft head)
hf download google/gemma-4-12B-it-qat-q4_0-gguf gemma-4-12b-it-qat-q4_0.gguf --local-dir ./models
hf download unsloth/gemma-4-12b-it-GGUF MTP/gemma-4-12b-it-Q8_0-MTP.gguf --local-dir ./models

# 4a. run as an OpenAI-compatible server
./fucina -m ./models/gemma-4-12b-it-qat-q4_0.gguf --ctx 32768 --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080
curl http://localhost:8080/v1/chat/completions \
  -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Hello"}],"stream":true}'

# 4b. run as an interactive REPL (commands: /reset /stats /quit)
./fucina -m ./models/gemma-4-12b-it-qat-q4_0.gguf --interactive

# 4c. one-shot
./fucina -m ./models/gemma-4-12b-it-qat-q4_0.gguf -p "Write a haiku about CUDA." -n 100

# 5. MTP speculative decoding (faster; works in all 3 modes) — add the draft head:
./fucina -m ./models/gemma-4-12b-it-qat-q4_0.gguf \
         --assistant ./models/MTP/gemma-4-12b-it-Q8_0-MTP.gguf --interactive
```

- **Gotcha:** a *raw* `-p` prompt on this instruction-tuned model degenerates into repetition. For
  coherent output use the chat path (server `/v1/chat/completions`, or the REPL) — both apply the
  gemma-4 chat template. `make smoke` uses a raw prompt on purpose (it only checks the engine runs).
- Watch speculation live at `/metrics` → `speculation` (`accept_rate`, `tokens_per_forward`). Decode
  on GB10 is bandwidth-bound on weight bytes; the levers are CUDA-graph launch-bubble removal + τ.
- Key flags: `--ctx` (default 262144; raises only the global-layer KV), `--temp`/`--top-k`/`--top-p`,
  `--thinking off|on|low|mid|high|xhigh`, `--spec` (on), `--draft-k`, `--assistant`. `fucina --help`.
- Memory levers (memory-constrained hosts): `FUCINA_NO_PACKED=1` drops the repacked-Q4_0 decode-GEMV
  weight copy — **frees ~7 GiB VRAM**, ~2–3% slower decode, output bit-identical. `FUCINA_SLIDING_RING=N`
  sets the sliding ring capacity (default 8192); also the max-exact prefix-reuse rewind depth (deeper
  → full re-prefill). ring + `FUCINA_NO_PACKED=1` ≈ **23 GiB total at 131072** (vs ~53 GiB before).

## DiffusionGemma (optional, experimental)

```sh
make CUTLASS_DIR=/path/to/cutlass          # needs CUTLASS headers (pip install flashinfer vendors them)
hf download unsloth/diffusiongemma-26B-A4B-it-GGUF diffusiongemma-26B-A4B-it-Q4_K_M.gguf --local-dir ./models
./fucina -dm ./models/diffusiongemma-26B-A4B-it-Q4_K_M.gguf --denoise-steps 16 -p "Explain hashing."
```
Block text-diffusion (256-token canvas), not autoregressive; no token streaming; `-dm` implies the
NVFP4 MoE experts. See README "DiffusionGemma".

## Architecture (key files)

- [cuda/gemma4_kernels.cu](cuda/gemma4_kernels.cu): the entire dense-12B forward pass — quantized
  GEMV/GEMM (Q4_0/Q6_K/Q8_0 dp4a), FP8 flash attention, RoPE, RMSNorm, GeGLU, GPU sampling, CUDA
  graphs, and the MTP draft head + speculative-verify loop. Compiled to `cuda/libfucina.a`.
- [cuda/gemma4_kernels.cuh](cuda/gemma4_kernels.cuh): model dimensions + engine struct.
- [internal/engine/cuda/bridge.go](internal/engine/cuda/bridge.go): cgo bridge (`NewEngine`,
  `Prefill`, `Decode`, `GenerateSpec`, `LoadAssistant`, `SampleDevice`, …).
- [internal/server](internal/server): OpenAI-compatible HTTP server, gemma-4 chat template, tool
  calls, thinking channel, prefix-reuse KV cache, `/metrics` + `/health`.
- [internal/tokenizer](internal/tokenizer): Gemma 4 SentencePiece/Unigram tokenizer (vocab 262144).
- [cmd/fucina](cmd/fucina): CLI entry point + run modes (`main.go`, `args.go`, `oneshot.go`, `repl.go`).
- DiffusionGemma (separate engine): [cuda/diffusion_gemma_engine.cu](cuda/diffusion_gemma_engine.cu),
  [cuda/diffusion_gemma_kernels.cu](cuda/diffusion_gemma_kernels.cu),
  [cuda/dg_fp4_moe.cu](cuda/dg_fp4_moe.cu) (CUTLASS NVFP4 expert GEMM),
  [internal/engine/diffusion](internal/engine/diffusion), [cmd/fucina/diffusion.go](cmd/fucina/diffusion.go).

## Model facts

Gemma 4 12B: 48 layers (40 sliding-window + 8 global), GeGLU FFN (`gelu_pytorch_tanh`, intermediate
15360), RoPE/p-RoPE, logit softcap 30.0, vocab 262144, hidden 3840, Q6_K tied LM head. KV cache is
FP8 E4M3. The 40 sliding layers use a capped **ring buffer** (`FUCINA_SLIDING_RING`, default 8192
slots ≈ 1.5 GiB, ctx-independent); only the 8 global layers scale with `--ctx` (~2.0 GiB at 262144).
Total KV ≈ **3.5 GiB at 262144 / 2.5 GiB at 131072** (was ~54 GiB before the ring). The MTP draft head
is a 4-layer `gemma4-assistant` GGUF (~444 MB Q8_0), a build of `google/gemma-4-12B-it-assistant`.

## Build / test / dev

- [Makefile](Makefile): `make` (dense + diffusion), `make smoke` (build + raw-prompt run),
  `make check` (vet + pure-Go tests), `make test` (adds GPU self-tests). Overridable paths:
  `NVCC` `CUDA_HOME` `GO` `CUTLASS_DIR` `DG_GGUF`.
- CPU-only tests (no GPU): `go test ./internal/server/ ./internal/tokenizer/ ./internal/sampler/ ./internal/chat/`.
- Correctness bar: greedy output bit-exact vs reference; `compute-sanitizer` clean. Harnesses:
  [scripts/pi_bench.py](scripts/pi_bench.py), [scripts/parity_bench.py](scripts/parity_bench.py),
  [scripts/benchmark_gem4.py](scripts/benchmark_gem4.py).

## More

- [README.md](README.md): full install, models, usage, MTP, HTTP API, hardware, status.

  [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) · [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md).
- Status: experimental, single-hardware (GB10), best-effort support only.
